description: Parse the user input to extract triangle area calculation parameters and format as function call

inputs.name: input_text
inputs.description: The raw user input text containing triangle area calculation request with base and height values

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: JSON string of available function definitions for context and validation

output.description: Returns a function call object with the function name as the top-level key and parameters nested within. Example: {"calculate_triangle_area": {"base": 10, "height": 5, "unit": "units"}}. The structure has the function name (calculate_triangle_area) as a key containing the extracted parameters (base, height, unit) with their actual values parsed from the input text.

fields.calculate_triangle_area: dict containing base (integer), height (integer), and unit (string) parameters

workflow_spec.name: Parse Function Call Workflow
workflow_spec.description: Parses user input to extract function name and parameters for triangle area calculation
